title: The Crew Is Taken Toward Upper Yard
description: Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.
scene: Across pages 14, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Conis, Luffy, Nami, McKinley, Usopp. Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Hey, tell that dog to shut up!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Seven heads? It's not divisible by four!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: come to think of it, what was that earlier....!! WHO ARE THEY? WHAT IS THIS PLACE!??

dialogue.speaker: McKinley
dialogue.text: SkyPica Police "White Breet Division" Captain McKinley

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I gotta hurry and warn everyone!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey Luffy, let's go. Get aboard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That suspicious looking ship! Stop right there!!

summary: Conis warns the Straw Hats about Skypiea’s law, and the crew is pulled deeper into God Enel’s territory.
